title: Paridiniyamam Parithiappar Temple
tagline: Paridiniyamam Parithiappar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Keezhvengainaadu Paridiniyamam Parithiappar Temple (கீழ்வேங்கைநாடு பரிதிநியமம் பரிதியப்பர் கோயில்) is a Tamil temple located at Parithiappar Koil, Keezhvengainaadu in Thanjavur dis
overview.description: Keezhvengainaadu Paridiniyamam Parithiappar Temple (கீழ்வேங்கைநாடு பரிதிநியமம் பரிதியப்பர் கோயில்) is a Tamil temple located at Parithiappar Koil, Keezhvengainaadu in Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is dedicated to Shiva, as the moolavar presiding deity, in his manifestation as Parithiappar. His consort, Parvati, is known as Mangalambikai.

topPlaces.name: Alivoikkal
topPlaces.description: Azhiyavaikkal is a village in the Orathanadu taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Thennamanadu
topPlaces.description: Thennamanadu is a village panchayat in Orattanadu Block of Thanjavur district in Tamil Nadu, South India. It is located between the cities of Thanjavur and Pattukkottai, 20 km (12 mi) from Thanjavur, 2 km (1.2 mi) from Orathanadu and 339 km (211 mi) from the state capital Chennai.

topPlaces.name: Madigai
topPlaces.description: Madigai is a village in the Thanjavur taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Ammankudi
topPlaces.description: Ammankudi is a village in the Orathanadu taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India. Ammankudi, also known as Rajarajeswaram and Devi Tapovanam is situated near Kumbakonam in Thanjavur District.

topPlaces.name: Orathanadu Taluk
topPlaces.description: Orathanadu taluk, which is pronounced as 'Oraththanaadu' taluk, is a taluk of Thanjavur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk are located at Orathanadu.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Paridiniyamam Parithiappar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Paridiniyamam Parithiappar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Paridiniyamam Parithiappar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (58 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (61 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Paridiniyamam Parithiappar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Paridiniyamam Parithiappar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Paridiniyamam Parithiappar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Paridiniyamam Parithiappar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Paridiniyamam Parithiappar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Alivoikkal, Thennamanadu, Madigai, Ammankudi, Orathanadu Taluk.
